designSystem.fontFamily: -apple-system, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif
designSystem.style: AI Personalization Landing — animation-heavy with microinteractions, smooth transitions, breathing/floating effects, and a calm, immersive aesthetic

features.themeToggle: Dark (default) and light mode with full theme object
features.animations: fadeInUp, fadeIn, slideUp, pulse, shimmer, float, breathe, ripple, gentleBob
features.interactions: Card press effects, tab transitions, prompt carousel, spirit unlock modal, meditation player, journal entry creation
